auth_notes: Requires Google Cloud Console project setup, enabling the Gmail API, and configuring an OAuth consent screen. Users must define specific scopes like 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify' or 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send'.
rate_limits: 1,000,000 quota units per day per project; 250 quota units per user per second. Sending an email costs 100 units; reading a message costs 5 units.
gotchas: OAuth tokens expire every 7 days if the Google Cloud Project is in 'Testing' mode; must be set to 'In Production' to maintain long-term access.
Gmail API has a 25MB limit for total message size including attachments; larger files require Google Drive links.
The Gmail Trigger node in n8n uses polling by default, but can be configured for push notifications via Google Cloud Pub/Sub for real-time performance.
client_must_provide: Gmail account credentials for OAuth consent
research_notes: The prompt mentions 'Email/Sheets' but provides Gmail node info. This analysis focuses on the Gmail integration. For Sheets, a separate 'n8n-nodes-base.googleSheets' node is required, though they share the same Google Cloud Console authentication framework.

effort_recommendation.rationale: The prompt mentions 'Email/Sheets' but provides Gmail node info. This analysis focuses on the Gmail integration. For Sheets, a separate 'n8n-nodes-base.googleSheets' node is required, though they share the same Google Cloud Console authentication framework.
